zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster於1376年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾洛維其可時，她的父親Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton24歲，母親Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster22歲。她於大約1394年與Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1421年5月1日在英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯享年45歲，埋葬在英國戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster于1376年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾洛維其可时，她的父亲Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton24岁，母亲Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster22岁。她于大约1394年与Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1421年5月1日在英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯享年45岁，埋葬在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Elenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster was born in 1376, in Lowick, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton, was 24 and her mother, Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster, was 22. She married Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough about 1394. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 1 May 1421, in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Devon, England.

fr.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster est née en 1376, à Lowick, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough environ 1394. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 mai 1421, à Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Devon, Angleterre.

de.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster 1376 in Lowick, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster 22. Sie hat um 1394 Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Mai 1421 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Devon, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough circa 1394. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. ko.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster(이)가 1376년 영국 노르섬프토실르 로이c크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1394년 Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 5월 1일 영국 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰에 묻혔다.

pt.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster nasceu em 1376, em Lowick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough aproximadamente 1394. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de maio de 1421, em Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.Sprotborough, Yorkshire, England: спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elenor de Grene of Drayton and Warminster родилась в 1376 г. в местности лоуикк, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough около 1394 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 1 мая 1421 г. в местности спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности девон, Англия.

Se casó con Sir John FitzWilliam of Spotbrough aproximadamente 1394. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1421, en Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Devon, Inglaterra.
